title: Entity
description: Abstract base entity for all Herbapedia data types. Every entity in the system inherits from this base, providing common identity, naming, and provenance fields.

@context.description: JSON-LD context reference. Can be a single URI or an array of URIs for multiple contexts.

@id.description: Unique identifier for this entity. Uses a compact IRI format: `{namespace}/{type}/{slug}`. This ID is used for all cross-references between entities.

@type.description: JSON-LD type declaration. An array of RDF types that categorize this entity. The first type is the primary type, followed by any additional semantic types.

name.description: Primary name of the entity as a language map. Each key is a BCP 47 language tag, and the value is the name in that language. At minimum, English ('en') is required.

description.description: Detailed description of the entity as a language map.

alternateName.description: Alternative names or synonyms for this entity.

image.description: Primary image for this entity. Path is relative to the repository root.

sameAs.description: External authority references. Links this entity to equivalent entities in external databases like Wikidata, GBIF, or POWO.
